title: lavenia elata
intro: Lavenia elata is a plant species also known as the "Fragrant Bush" or "Sweet Woodruff," belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lavenia elata include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
